title: A Real Woman
writer: Alberto Cavalcanti, Galeão Coutinho, Oswaldo Molles
actors: Carlos Araújo, Adoniran Barbosa, Inezita Barroso
plot: A nurse falls in love with her patient and secretly marries him. When treating another patient, he falls in love with her and, pretending to be in agony, asks for one last wish: to marry him, and she accepts.
